# Developer docs

For people **using** this project. How to install, integrate, and call the
public surface — what an outside developer needs to ship against this.

This folder is regenerated by the **auto-docs** scheduled agent — see
[`.agents/auto-docs.md`](../../.agents/auto-docs.md). Files here are
agent-owned: amend the source (code exports + README quick-start) rather than
the rendered docs.

## What lives here

- **`getting-started.md`** — install + first run, derived from README Quick start.
- **`public-api.md`** — exported public surface (no internals).
- **`recipes.md`** — common integration patterns, from `examples/` or README
  feature blocks.

## When this regenerates

The auto-docs agent re-runs on a schedule (default weekly). It scans index
files for exports, README headings, and example folders. No-op when nothing
material changed.

## Human-authored docs

Tutorials, marketing pages, deeper conceptual guides — anything that needs
human voice — belong **outside** this folder.
